description.short: Get your trip off to a great start with a stay at this property, which offers car park free of charge. Conveniently situated in the Takengon part of Aceh, this property puts you close to attractions and interesting dining options. Don't leave before paying a visit to the famous Sultan Iskandar Muda International Airport.  This 5-star property features hot tub to make your stay more indulgent and memorable.
